_comment: Copy to scripts/llm-bakeoff.config.json (gitignored) and fill in keys. TIP: with ONE OpenRouter key you can compare many models — just add rows with the same url+key and different 'model' slugs. Endpoints/model names drift — verify in each provider's docs.
_decider: Read the UZBEK outputs. All are pennies/month at this volume — quality (esp. Uzbek) + whether you want one model for text+vision is the real choice. Finalists: DeepSeek V4 Flash (text-only, proven) vs Qwen3.6 (multilingual leader + NATIVE vision = one model for everything).
